title: AnimationRecorder
body:
**Record your own GIF/JPG/PNGs of Minecraft mobs/entities!**

Press【Y】to target the entity.
Press【Ctrl+Y】to target the player yourself.

After targetting an entity, press【U】to start recording.
You can always press【U】to stop recording in advance.

More options are available in the setting screen, you can change its hotkey binding. 

![Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae63d4b16dfcd11d879a4add8eda02532893da82.gif)
